name: Company Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, heat bouillon in 1/4 cup water until dissolved.
2. Add cabbage, carrots, onions, salt, and pepper to the saucepan.
3. Toss to mix the ingredients.
4. Cook covered over medium heat for 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the vegetables.
6. In a separate bowl, combine butter, chopped pecans, and prepared mustard.
7. Pour the mixture over the cooked vegetables and toss to coat evenly.
8. Sprinkle paprika on top before serving.
